name: Ryu-Ge End
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>襲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>焉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Your opponent cannot target "Ryu-Ge" monsters you control with card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Ryu-Ge End" once per turn. If a "Ryu-Ge" Pendulum Monster is in your field or face-up Extra Deck: You can shuffle 2 "Ryu-Ge" monsters from your hand, GY, and/or banishment into the Main Deck, then target 1 monster on the field; destroy it. If this card is destroyed: You can Set 1 non-Continuous "Ryu-Ge" Trap from your Deck, GY, or banishment.
eff: Your opponent cannot target "Ryu-Ge" monsters you control with card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Ryu-Ge End" once per turn. If a "Ryu-Ge" Pendulum Monster is in your field or face-up Extra Deck: You can shuffle 2 "Ryu-Ge" monsters from your hand, GY, and/or banishment into the Main Deck, then target 1 monster on the field; destroy it. If this card is destroyed: You can Set 1 non-Continuous "Ryu-Ge" Trap from your Deck, GY, or banishment.

action: Returns from hand to Deck for cost
Returns from Graveyard to Deck for cost
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck for cost
mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
